item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: Students working on their 40 volunteer hours are encouraged to check the Teams for approved opportunities or speak with a Guidance Counsellor for help getting started.

item.title: A message from 7/8 Athletics:
item.description: Reminder that today is practice #2 for 7/8 Track & Field. You must attend at least 3 out of the 5 practices in order to attend our meet. We will meet in the gym around 2:15

item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: The Grade 7/8 Gala is finally here! Join us on Friday, June 5th in the afternoon for an exciting celebration full of fun and talent! Students who would like to participate in the Talent Show portion of the gala must sign up ahead of time. See Mme Bourdon at lunchtime to sign up and reserve your spot! Don’t miss your chance to shine on stage!

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: The weight room is closed today and tomorrow during lunch. It will be open on Wednesday, Thursday and Friday for all grades 9-12 students.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Varsity Ultimate Team have a practice today at lunch. The plan is to go outside and stay on the pavement - if the weather gets worse - then we will stay inside the gymnasium. Please have outdoor and indoor shoes ready.
